name: Cock a Noodle Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups No Yolks® egg noodle substitute
10 3/4 cups low-fat cream of mushroom soup
6 ozs chicken in water, drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the egg noodle substitute according to package directions.
2. In a 2-quart casserole dish, combine soup, 1/2 cup cheese, milk, and sour cream. Mix well.
3. Stir in noodles, vegetables, and chicken. Mix well.
4. Microwave, covered, on high for 10 minutes, or until heated through, stirring once.
5. Sprinkle remaining cheese on top. Microwave, on high, for 2 minutes, or until cheese has melted.
